name: Portable Devices (WPD / MTP)
categoryDescription: Hardware device connection history — USB storage, Bluetooth, portable devices, and imaging hardware.
description: Windows Portable Device (WPD) bus enumeration covering MTP-connected devices — phones, cameras, media players. Separate from USB mass storage (these devices appear as MTP not UMS).
forensic_value: Proves smartphone or camera connection via MTP protocol — important when the device would not appear in USBSTOR (phones use MTP, not mass storage). Friendly name often reveals phone model/owner.
